name: Seven Layer Dip
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces canned kidney beans, drained and rinsed
2 tablespoons jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
3 ripe avocados, halved, peeled and pitted
3 large tomatoes, degloped and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mash all bean ingredients together until smooth.
2. In another bowl, mash all guacamole ingredients together until smooth.
3. If making the guacamole ahead of time, cover it tightly with plastic wrap to prevent browning.
4. In a large baking dish or serving platter:
a. Spread the bean dip across the bottom.
b. Scatter half of the chopped tomatoes over the bean dip.
c. Spread the guacamole evenly over the tomatoes.
d. Drizzle the salsa over the guacamole.
e. Top with sour cream, then spread it over the salsa.
f. Distribute the remaining tomatoes over the sour cream.
g. Sprinkle grated Cheddar cheese on top.
5. Serve with plenty of tortilla chips.
